## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production expanded to 14 new pieces this week, including API-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Performance metrics show positive trends, particularly for API-related content](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to create "inflection points" for dramatic growth, including programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [New team member (Dave Pohn) joining to assist with strategy and programmatic efforts](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Aiming to scale up to 25 pieces per week, balancing production with indexing challenges](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [Expanded to 14 new pieces this week, including more API-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [API pages (deep-seek, Gemini, RESTful design) driving significant impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Overall site performance trending upward, with average position up 2 points in the past week](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Indexing delays persist for some content, requiring manual requests](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

### Team Updates and Strategy

  - [New team member Dave Pohn joining to assist with strategy and programmatic efforts](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Discussions around creating "inflection points" for dramatic growth](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic content opportunities and creative ways to reduce friction in content launch](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

### Content Workflow and Scaling

  - [Current workflow becoming more smooth and automatic](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Aiming to scale up to 25 pieces per week (100 per month)](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Considering ways to automate indexing checks and potentially bring on additional upload support](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### Performance Metrics and Renewal Discussions

  - [Two customer conversations generated from content in the past week](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Team focused on delivering enough content early to demonstrate value for potential renewal](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Balancing awareness (traffic) vs. conversion (signups) metrics in strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/eyR4ZdTsS7n5GyAsd1isbSdWriYHNTN_?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
